description: AutoStream is a SaaS product that provides automated video editing tools for content creators.

policies.refund: No refunds after 7 days of purchase.
policies.support: 24/7 support is available only on the Pro plan. Basic plan users get email support.
policies.trial: Free trial available for 7 days on the Pro plan.
policies.cancellation: You can cancel your subscription at any time.

faq.question: What platforms does AutoStream support?
faq.answer: AutoStream supports all major platforms including YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, Twitter/X, and Facebook.

faq.question: Can I upgrade from Basic to Pro?
faq.answer: Yes, you can upgrade at any time. The price difference will be prorated for the current billing cycle.

faq.question: Does AutoStream support team collaboration?
faq.answer: Team collaboration features are available on the Pro plan.

faq.question: What video formats are supported?
faq.answer: AutoStream supports MP4, MOV, AVI, MKV, and WebM formats for both input and output.
